pattern: Drive as far as the current fuel allows while banking every passed station's fuel in a max-heap, and whenever you stall, refuel from the largest banked station, so each stop buys the most reach possible.
hints: You do not have to decide at a station whether to stop; you can defer the choice until you actually run out of fuel.
Keep the fuel of every station you have driven past in a max-heap; when reach falls short of the next station or target, draw from the biggest pending tank.

Sort stations by position. Track current reach starting at startFuel. For each station within reach, push its fuel; if a station or the target is beyond reach, pop the largest fuel and add it (one stop) until reachable or the heap empties; if it empties first, return -1.

edge_inputs.description: first example: target reachable with no stations
second example: cannot even reach the only station
third example: two well-chosen stops out of four
must skip a small early tank for a large later one
stations exist but total fuel still falls short

stress.description: random reachable and unreachable scenarios with sorted station positions
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    target = rng.randint(50, 5000)
    start = rng.randint(1, target)
    count = rng.randint(0, max(0, size))
    positions = sorted(rng.sample(range(1, target), min(count, target - 1)))
    stations = [[p, rng.randint(1, target)] for p in positions]
    return [target, start, stations]
stress.note: distinct sorted positions strictly below target as required

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def minRefuelStops(self, target, startFuel, stations):
        import heapq
        heap = []
        reach = startFuel
        stops = 0
        i = 0
        n = len(stations)
        while reach < target:
            while i < n and stations[i][0] <= reach:
                heapq.heappush(heap, -stations[i][1])
                i += 1
            if not heap:
                return -1
            reach += -heapq.heappop(heap)
            stops += 1
        return stops
